title: Dark Lords of the Sith (disambiguation)
content:
The term, "'''''Dark Lords of the Sith'''''", can refer to:

*The plural form of the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|title]].

*An [[The Dark Lords of the Sith|exhibit]] in the [[Galactic Museum/Legends|Galactic Museum]] of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].

*The [[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi (comic series)|Tales of the Jedi]] [[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi - Dark Lords of the Sith|story arc]].
**Or the [[Tales of the Jedi: Dark Lords of the Sith (audio)|audio adaptation]] of said story arc.

*The novel ''[[Lords of the Sith]]'', which was mistakenly named ''Dark Lords of the Sith'' in the {{SW|url=series/the-bad-batch/rescue-on-ryloth|text=Rescue on Ryloth Episode Guide}}.

{{Disambig}}
